signals.title: Invesco vraagt goedkeuring aan voor gettokeniseerd fonds met stablecoins
signals.summary: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market

signals.title: Invesco onderzoekt stablecoin-reservefonds met Amerikaanse staatsobligaties
signals.summary: The fund will invest primarily in U.S. Treasuries, repo agreements, and cash equivalents to maintain a stable $1 net asset value.

signals.title: OpenPayd ontvangt MiCA-licentie voor crypto-diensten in Europa
signals.summary: OpenPayd, which provides infrastructure to companies including Kraken crypto exchange, can now offer regulated crypto services across Europe under MiCA.

signals.title: StablecoinX stapt in bij Ethena-ecosysteem met Nasdaq-notering vrijdag
signals.summary: USDe circulating supply has shrunk by 70% since the October bull market peak, when it topped $14 billion.

signals.title: BitGo ontslaat 15% personeel, richt zich op AI en stablecoins
signals.summary: BitGo CEO says the firm will now focus on key areas, including security, trading, stablecoins, settlement, and AI-powered infrastructure.

signals.title: Spark plaatst 150 miljoen dollar stablecoin op Uniswap voor gedeelde liquiditeit
signals.summary: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

signals.title: BitGo vervolg personeelsreductie van 15% voor AI en stablecoins
signals.summary: BitGo co-founder and CEO Mike Belshe says the layoffs are “a one-time action” and the company doesn’t see the need for further staff reductions.

signals.title: Circle en Nomura verkennen stablecoin-settlement voor bedrijfsvreemdevaluta Japan
signals.summary: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.
